reviews.comment:
Tienen AIRE para inflar cubiertas, pero es un poco complicado si tenés válvula distinta. No vas a poder inflar
Más si reemplazante con la rueda de auxilio.

(Translated by Google)
They have air for inflating tires, but it's a bit complicated if you have a different valve. You won't be able to inflate it, especially if you're replacing it with the spare tire.

reviews.comment:
La Full no tiene precios en ningún lugar. Solo te lo dicen cuando te cobran (ni siquiera en los combos de hamburguesas)

(Translated by Google)
La Full doesn't have prices displayed anywhere. They only tell you when they charge you (not even on the burger combos).
